de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews

Class SequentView

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • javax.swing.JComponent
          • javax.swing.text.JTextComponent
            • javax.swing.JEditorPane
              • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews.SequentView
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, java.io.Serializable, javax.accessibility.Accessible, javax.swing.Scrollable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    CurrentGoalView, EmptySequent, InnerNodeView

    public abstract class SequentView
extends javax.swing.JEditorPane
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

        public java.lang.String getHighlightedText()

      • correctedViewToModel

        public int correctedViewToModel(java.awt.Point p)
        Return the character index for a certain coordinate. The usual viewToModel is focused on inter-character spaces, not characters, so it returns the correct index in the left half of the glyph but one too many in the right half. Therefore, we get width of character before the one given by viewToModel, subtract it from the given x value, and get the character at the new position. That is the correct one.

        removes highlight by setting it to position (0,0)

        removes the term and first statement highlighter by setting them to position (0,0)

      • getFirstStatementRange

        protected Range getFirstStatementRange(java.awt.Point p)
        Get the character range to be highlighted for the first statement in a java block at the given coordinate in the displayed sequent. Returns null if there is no java block there.

      • computeLineWidth

        public int computeLineWidth()
        computes the line width

      • updateHeatmapSFHighlights

        protected void updateHeatmapSFHighlights(int max_age,
                                         boolean newest)
        Highlights sequent formulas according to their age (if newest is false), or the newest sequent formulas.
        Parameters:
        max_age - maximum age up to which sf's are highlighted, or number of recent sf's to highlight.
        newest - Are newest sf's highlighted (true) or all up to max_age (false)?

      • updateHeatmapTermHighlights

        protected void updateHeatmapTermHighlights(int max_age,
                                           boolean newest)
        Highlights terms according to their age (if newest is false), or the newest terms.
        Parameters:
        max_age - maximum age up to which terms are highlighted, or number of recent terms to highlight.
        newest - Are newest terms highlighted (true) or all up to max_age (false)?

      • printSequent

        public abstract void printSequent()

      • setFilter

        public void setFilter(SequentPrintFilter sequentPrintFilter)

      • getFilter

        protected SequentPrintFilter getFilter()

      • updateHidingProperty

        protected void updateHidingProperty()
        To update the enclosing components that might print a warning on hidden formulas, it suffices to repaint them.

      • isHiding

        public boolean isHiding()
        Does this component hide formulas from the sequent due to the set search bar filter
        Returns:
        true iff at least one formula is not shown

      • isMainSequentView

        public boolean isMainSequentView()
        Returns:
        true if this sequent view is supposed to be shown in the MainFrame, false if it is only supposed to be shown in some other frame.
